scripts.zip: bash -c 'set -e; SRC=$PWD; VERSION=$npm_package_version; rm -rf /tmp/riaco-reviews; rsync -rc --exclude-from=.distignore --exclude=.git . /tmp/riaco-reviews/; (cd /tmp && zip -rq $SRC/riaco-reviews-$VERSION.zip riaco-reviews); rm -rf /tmp/riaco-reviews; echo Created riaco-reviews-$VERSION.zip'
